quests.title: Word on the Street
quests.hook: "Go rattle Static Rin's cage at the Noodle Bar, see what she's picked up. Then come tell me."

steps.description: Talk to Static Rin at the Chrome Noodle Bar.
Report back to The Fixer.

quests.complete_text: "Good. Knowing things before everyone else — that's half the job."

quests.title: Chrome Debt
quests.hook: "Ganger crew's been shaking down my clients. Handle one of them in the Undercity, then report back."

steps.description: Take down a Street Ganger in the Undercity.
Report back to The Fixer.

quests.complete_text: "One down. Credits are yours — spend 'em quiet."

quests.title: Drone Bounty
quests.hook: "Corp's lost control of a delivery drone. Scrap it in the Undercity before it wanders into the wrong feed. Report back after."

steps.description: Scrap the Rogue Drone in the Undercity.
Report back to The Fixer.

quests.complete_text: "Nice and quiet. That's how the corp likes it. Here's your cut."

quests.title: Corp Trouble
quests.hook: "A corp patrol's been leaning on my Undercity contacts. Put one down, then get back here."

steps.description: Take down a Corp Patrol Trooper in the Undercity.
Report back to The Fixer.

quests.complete_text: "That'll rattle them for a while. Nice work."

quests.title: Corporate Housecleaning
quests.hook: "A corp strike team's leaning on my people. Level the playing field, then get back here."

steps.description: Take down the Corp Strike Team in the Undercity.
Report back to The Fixer.

quests.complete_text: "That'll keep them looking over their shoulder for a while."

quests.title: Ghost Protocol
quests.hook: "Some masterless netrunner's been poaching my clients. Handle it quiet."

steps.description: Take down the Ronin Netrunner in the Undercity.
Report back to The Fixer.

quests.complete_text: "Quiet's exactly how I like it. Here's your cut."

quests.title: Something's Loose
quests.hook: "Something's loose in the deep tunnels and it's bad for business. Put it down."

steps.description: Take down the Chrome Beast in the Undercity.
Report back to The Fixer.

quests.complete_text: "I didn't want to know what that was. Good work not telling me."

quests.title: Turf War
quests.hook: "A gang boss is muscling out my usual contacts, carving up territory that isn't his. Cut the head off, then come tell me."

steps.description: Take down the Ganger Boss in the Undercity.
Report back to The Fixer.

quests.complete_text: "Territory's a lot quieter without a boss running it. Good work."

quests.title: Blacksite Leak
quests.hook: "Word is a corp's running an off-books enforcer through the Undercity — no ID, no paper trail. Somebody wants that connection erased. Handle it."

steps.description: Take down the Corp Blacksite Enforcer in the Undercity.
Report back to The Fixer.

quests.complete_text: "Whoever sent him isn't going to send another. Not soon, anyway."

quests.title: Debt Collector
quests.hook: "I've got a debt hanging over my head with some very patient people. 150 credits clears it. Call it an investment in my good mood."

steps.description: Pay off the Fixer's 150-credit debt at the Fixer Board.

quests.complete_text: "Debt's clear. That's the kind of trust that gets you better jobs."

quests.title: Clean Getaway
quests.hook: "Corp patrol's sniffing around one of my drop points. Handle the trooper, then grease the right palm at NetVault to make the paperwork disappear."

steps.description: Take down the Corp Patrol Trooper in the Undercity.
Pay a 100-credit cleanup fee at NetVault to bury the paperwork.

quests.complete_text: "Paperwork's gone, trooper's gone. Nice and clean."

quests.title: Loose Ends
quests.hook: "Nothing fancy — just need someone reliable to rough up a ganger who's been skipping his tab. You in?"

steps.description: Handle the Street Ganger in the Undercity.
Report back to Endr3am.

quests.complete_text: "Appreciate it. Drinks are still not free, though."

quests.title: Loose Lips
quests.hook: "You've got a way with people. Get Ms. Kessler talking over at NetVault — she knows things she shouldn't. Then come tell me."

steps.description: Charm some gossip out of Ms. Kessler at NetVault.
Bring what you heard back to Endr3am.

quests.complete_text: "Knew you had it in you. That's worth something."

quests.title: Friends in High Places
quests.hook: "I know a guy who owes a corp patrol a black eye. You've got the smile to talk your way in close. Handle it, then come back."

steps.description: Deal with the Corp Patrol Trooper in the Undercity.
Report back to Endr3am.

quests.complete_text: "Told you I had friends. Drinks are on me tonight."

quests.title: New Blood
quests.hook: "Got a new contact worth vetting. Go talk to her at NetVault, see if she's solid."

steps.description: Vet the new contact at NetVault.
Report back to Endr3am.

quests.complete_text: "Good instincts. I'll keep sending work your way."

quests.title: Steady Hands
quests.hook: "A rogue drone's been circling this block too long. Ground it, then come tell me."

steps.description: Ground the Rogue Drone in the Undercity.
Report back to Endr3am.

quests.complete_text: "Steady hands. I like that in a merc."

quests.title: Something in the Pipes
quests.hook: "Something's been dragging drunks into the storm drains and not letting go. Bad for the bar's reputation. Handle it, then come tell me."

steps.description: Deal with whatever's in the drains, in the Undercity.
Report back to Endr3am.

quests.complete_text: "Good. People drink better when they're not worried about what's under the street."

quests.title: Fence Trouble
quests.hook: "A scavenger's been fencing goods that were supposed to disappear quietly. Make sure they do. You've got the charm to get close first."

steps.description: Deal with the Scav Prowler in the Undercity.
Report back to Endr3am.

quests.complete_text: "Discreet. I like that in a merc."

quests.title: Silver Tongue
quests.hook: "There's a Scav out in the Undercity sitting on a datapad that isn't his to sell. Don't buy it back — talk him out of it. You've got the mouth for it. If you don't, well... he won't hand it over quietly."

steps.description: Talk the Scav Prowler in the Undercity out of the stolen datapad (Charisma 7+, or fight for it).
Bring the datapad back to Endr3am.

quests.complete_text: "Didn't even have to raise your voice, did you? That's the job, choom."

quests.title: A Gift for Endr3am
quests.hook: "Buy me a Razor Claws rig from Hyphen8d's Hut — I've got a buyer lined up who'll owe us both. Bring it here when you've got it."

steps.description: Buy a Razor Claws arm rig (150cr) from Hyphen8d's Hut.
Deliver the Razor Claws to Endr3am at the Chrome Noodle Bar.

quests.complete_text: "Now THAT'S a gift. My buyer's going to owe me for weeks."
